宿.origin: 屋顶“宀”下有人在休息，指住下、过夜。

sentence.en: We live in the school dormitory.

寄.origin: 宝盖头“宀”加“奇”，指把东西托人送出去。

sentence.en: I mailed a letter to my grandpa.

寅.origin: 古时计时用的字，是十二地支之一。

sentence.en: Ancient people used 'yín' to mark the time.

密.origin: “宓”加“山”，指紧紧靠近、不让人知道的秘密。

sentence.en: This is our little secret.

寇.origin: 有人闯进屋子“宀”抢东西，指强盗。

sentence.en: In ancient times, invaders often attacked.
The weather in winter is very cold.

寓.origin: 宝盖头“宀”加“禺”，指住的地方。

sentence.en: He lives in a small apartment.

寡.origin: 指少，也指死了丈夫的女人。

sentence.en: This character is read guǎ.

寨.origin: 用木头围起来的村子或营地，叫山寨。

sentence.en: There is a small village on the mountain.

寺.origin: 原指官府，后来多指和尚住的庙。

sentence.cn: 山上有一座古老的寺庙。
sentence.en: There is an old temple on the mountain.

导.origin: 有手“寸”指路的意思，表示带路、引导。

sentence.en: The tour guide took us sightseeing.

封.origin: 右边是手“寸”，指把信口封住，也用来数信。

sentence.en: He put the letter into the envelope.

将.origin: 有“快要”的意思，也可读作将军的将。

sentence.en: I want to be a teacher in the future.
He is a captain.

尚.origin: 有“还、仍然”的意思，也表示崇尚。

sentence.en: The homework is not yet finished.

尝.origin: 上面是“尚”，下面像舌头，指用嘴尝味道。

sentence.en: I had a taste of the cake.

sentence.cn: 我喜欢水果，尤其是苹果。
sentence.en: I like fruit, especially apples.

尸.origin: 像一个人弯腰躺着的样子，指死了的身体。

sentence.en: This character is read shī.
I will do my best.

尿.origin: 人弯腰“尸”下面是水“水”，指撒尿。

sentence.en: My little brother needs to pee.

局.origin: 指办公的地方，也指棋的一盘。

sentence.en: Mom went to the post office to mail a parcel.

屁.origin: “尸”表示身体，“比”提示读音，指放屁。

sentence.en: The puppy let out a fart.
He cried after feeling wronged.

屉.origin: 指能拉出来放东西的抽屉。

sentence.en: The pen is in the drawer.

届.origin: 有到了时候、每一次的意思。

sentence.en: This is this year's sports meet.

屎.origin: 人弯腰“尸”下面是“米”，指大便。

sentence.en: The baby pooped.

屏.origin: 原指挡风的东西，现在也指屏幕。

sentence.en: The TV screen is very big.

展.origin: 有展开、铺开给人看的意思。

sentence.en: He spread out the map.
This character is read ē.

属.origin: 有归属、隶属的意思，也指生肖属相。

sentence.en: This book belongs to me.
The butcher is cutting meat.

屡.origin: 有一次又一次、经常的意思。

sentence.en: He was late time and again.

屯.origin: 指小村子，也有聚集、储存的意思。

sentence.cn: 他们住在一个小屯子里。
sentence.en: They live in a small village.

岂.origin: 上面是“山”，常用来反问，表示“难道”。

sentence.en: How could we give up?
There is a fork in the road ahead.

岗.origin: “山”加“冈”，指小山，也指站岗的位置。

sentence.en: He stays firmly at his post.
There are many rocks on the mountain.

岭.origin: “山”表示意思，“令”提示读音，指山脉、山顶。

sentence.en: In the distance are rolling mountain ridges.

岳.origin: 上面是“丘”下面是“山”，指高大的山。

sentence.en: The mountains here rise high.

峡.origin: 两座“山”中间夹着的地方，叫峡谷。

sentence.en: The river flows through the gorge.

峰.origin: “山”表示意思，“夆”提示读音，指山的最高处。

sentence.en: The mountain peak is covered with white snow.
This is a lofty ideal.

崔.origin: “山”加“隹”，形容高大，也常用作姓。

sentence.en: My teacher's surname is Cui.
He stands at the edge of the cliff.
The heavy rain made the hillside collapse.

嵌.origin: 有把东西镶进去的意思。

sentence.en: A gem is set into the ring.
He climbed to the summit of the mountain.

州.origin: 像河“川”中间的小岛，原指水中陆地，后指地方。

sentence.en: I have been to Guangzhou.
The police are patrolling the streets.

巢.origin: 像鸟在树“木”上搭的窝，指鸟巢。

sentence.en: There is a bird's nest in the tree.
